hook.text: Nikola claimed to have a working hydrogen truck. The demo video used a truck rolling downhill.

buildup.text: The EV startup went public via SPAC and reached a $30 billion valuation without selling a truck.

discovery.text: A short seller proved the demo truck was unpowered—just gravity doing the work.

twist.text: Founder Trevor Milton made false claims about technology, partnerships, and revenue.

climax.text: Milton was convicted of fraud in 2022 and sentenced to four years in prison.

punchline.text: The truck didn't drive. It just rolled downhill.

quiz.question: What did a short seller prove about Nikola's truck demo?
options: The truck was rolling downhill under gravity
It was a different brand's truck
